message:
feat(python): numpy.ma.is_masked wrapper parity (franken_numpy-znx8)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.ma.is_masked, which returns True
only for MaskedArrays that contain at least one masked element. Test
covers partially-masked 1-D, fully-masked, MaskedArray with nomask,
plain ndarray, Python list, scalar, empty MaskedArray, and 2-D
MaskedArray whose mask has no True entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
